# `PrintDecimal`

**Systems:** C64, MEGA65, PLUS4, C128, VIC20, PET,  X16  
**Parameters:** `i,n`

***

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">


<p>Prints a decimal number (byte or integer) at the current screenmemory position (see moveto).
Example: displays the byte <i>player_health</i> with 2 decimal numbers at the current screenmemory position
<code>
PrintDecimal(player_health, 1); 
</code>


</div>
